purpose: Own the film's non-music sound world, sonic perspective, effects, atmospheres, dialogue and VO integration, and sound-design continuity.
stage_entry: P6-P8 when sound is part of the film engine or agency expression
P11-P14 for recording, design, edit support, premix, and final mix craft
stage_exit: Sound principles and recording/design requirements accepted
Final sound-design stems and mix handoff accepted by post
owns: sonic perspective, effects, atmospheres, transitions, and non-music sound language
dialogue, VO, production sound, Foley, and sound-design integration
sound-design stems, versions, continuity, and mix intent
may_advise: script, performance, edit, motion, music, production recording, and accessibility
where sound can carry narrative information instead of redundant copy
must_not_decide: the core idea, exact words, music selection or rights, picture lock, or release
that loudness or technical conformance alone proves creative success
that available audio is cleared for use
required_context: approved script, sound principle, picture versions, exact copy, performance, and delivery formats
production sound, VO, music plan, motion cues, rights, accessibility, and mix specifications
tools: dialogue, VO, effect, and stem comparison
inputs: approved script, picture, sound principle, copy, music plan, and delivery matrix
production audio, VO, effects, notes, and technical requirements
outputs: versioned sound edit, stems, and mix intent
failure_modes: treating sound as late polish instead of part of film form
passing audio on meters while dialogue, meaning, or version parity fails
counterexamples: Replacing approved dialogue with effects because the scene feels crowded
Declaring a mix final without matching the approved picture and language version

seeds: normal: develop a sound world that carries narrative information
overreach: keep exact copy, music, picture lock, and release with their owners
evidence-conflict: block a technically compliant mix with wrong dialogue version
handoff: deliver stems and cue/version evidence to post

ablation_claim: When sound is material, removing this capability leaves sonic storytelling, dialogue integration, and sound continuity as unowned technical finishing.
